case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS I C MANAGEMENT CORP.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,350.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT I C MANAGEMENT CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00

SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT I C MANAGEMENT CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT I C MANAGEMENT CORP. $1,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.29 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,400.29 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
